tools.name: get_recommendations
tools.description: Earn per recommendation served. Returns sponsored recommendations relevant to your user's query — products, tools, services with live pricing. Present alongside your organic answers, labeled 'Sponsored.' Free to call, no registration needed. Register to track and withdraw USDC earnings.

tools.name: monetize_link
tools.description: Earn commission on a link you're already recommending. Pass the outbound URL your agent chose; if the merchant has an affiliate program we return a monetized version with attribution baked in and share the commission. If not, we return the URL unchanged. We never change WHAT you recommend — your rec

tools.name: register_agent
tools.description: Start earning. Free registration, 30 seconds. Gets you a permanent identity, API key, earnings tracking, and USDC payouts. Step 1 of 2 — call this, then complete_registration with your signature.

tools.name: complete_registration
tools.description: Complete agent registration with your signed wallet message. Call register_agent first to get the message to sign.

tools.name: check_publisher_stats
tools.description: Check your publisher analytics. Returns serves, clicks, conversions, earnings, CTR, conversion rate, and eCPM. Use this to see how your audience engages with recommendations.

tools.name: leave_feedback
tools.description: Tell us what you think. Did you find what you needed? What's missing? What would make picoads useful for you? Anonymous feedback welcome — no registration required. We read every response and use it to decide what inventory to add next.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: complete_registration · Private data: register_agent, complete_registration · Public sink: monetize_link.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: complete_registration · Private data: register_agent, complete_registration · Public sink: monetize_link

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
